description_long: This is a life-sized model of a horse with a robust, muscular build and a smooth, glossy brown coat. The mane and tail are a pale, almost white color, flowing naturally along the neck and down the back. The horse's head is elongated with a white blaze running down the center of its face, and its ears are upright and alert. The legs are sturdy and well-proportioned, ending in light-colored hooves. The body is free of any visible tack or equipment, emphasizing the natural contours and musculature. The overall appearance is realistic and well-detailed, suitable for urban environments such as parks or themed displays.
description: A realistic, brown horse with a pale mane and tail, upright ears, and a white facial blaze, standing naturally with no tack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horse's elongated face, white blaze, upright ears, and symmetrical stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth brown coat, flowing pale mane, and muscular body profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad hindquarters, pale tail, and even stance of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the mane's length and the horse's overall proportions.
attribute_pose: The horse is depicted in a standing posture with a relaxed, natural stance.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is loose and flowing, draping naturally along the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are on the ground, bearing weight evenly in a square stance.
